si.t: Key to the Tables of the Implementation eXtra Information for Test
Implementation eXtra Information for Test, IXIT
IXIT Proforma for Bluetooth Conformance Test Suites

This document specifies the Implementation eXtra Information for Test (IXIT) and is a supplement to the Test Suites and ICS documents to help execute tests using Bluetooth dedicated test equipment. Supported values are given as a single value or a range depending on the nature of the parameter.
NOTE: A test plan will define the applicable tests to be executed on an implementation; thus, a subset of the values listed in here may need to be filled out.

TO THE EXTENT NOT PROHIBITED BY LAW, BLUETOOTH SIG, ITS MEMBERS, AND THEIR AFFILIATES DISCLAIM ALL LIABILITY ARISING OUT OF OR RELATING TO USE OF THIS DOCUMENT AND ANY INFORMATION CONTAINED IN THIS DOCUMENT, INCLUDING LOST REVENUE, PROFITS, DATA OR PROGRAMS, OR BUSINESS INTERRUPTION, OR FOR SPECIAL, INDIRECT, CONSEQUENTIAL, INCIDENTAL OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, HOWEVER CAUSED AND REGARDLESS OF THE THEORY OF LIABILITY, AND EVEN IF BLUETOOTH SIG, ITS MEMBERS, OR THEIR AFFILIATES HAVE BEEN ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES.

This document is proprietary to Bluetooth SIG. This document may contain or cover subject matter that is intellectual property of Bluetooth SIG and its members. The furnishing of this document does not grant any license to any intellectual property of Bluetooth SIG or its members.
This document is subject to change without notice.
Initial version submitted as part of CR package for BTI review
Updated for Formal IOP event in Chambery
Proposed draft for D1.0 BTI review
Proposed draft for D1.0 BTI round 2 review
Set publication number to p0. Template-related editorials. Approved by BTI on 2020-07-06. BLP v1.1 and BLS v1.1 adopted by BoD on 2020-12-15.Prepared for publication.
Record Access Control Point Op Code
Record Access Control Point Operand Filter type
Set of values of all Device Information Service characteristic UUIDs that the IUT supports.
Set of values of User Data Service characteristic UUIDs supported by the IUT.
Set of values of User Data Service characteristic UUIDs for which the IUT supports reading.
Set of values of all User Data Service characteristic UUIDs for which the IUT supports writing.
Blood Pressure Sensor RACP Supported Operators: Provide the Blood Pressure Sensor supported Operators
Blood Pressure Sensor RACP Supported Operands: Provide the Blood Pressure Sensor supported Operands
RACP Op Code: Provide a supported Op Code for the optional Operator
RACP Optional Operator: Provide a supported optional Operator for the optional Operator
RACP Operand - Filter Type: Provide a supported Operand Filter Type for the optional Operator
RACP Op Code: Provide a supported Op Code for the optional Operand
RACP Operator: Provide a supported Operator for the optional Operand
RACP Optional Operand - Filter Type: Provide a supported optional Operand Filter Type for the optional Operand
Updated IXIT to latest template. BLS tab removed as there are no IXIT items currently defined.
* BLS does not currently have any IXIT items defined and the tab has been removed in the latest IXIT revision.

Minor editorials from Alicia, and updated copyright page.
Approved by BTI on 2022-01-06. Prepared for TCRL 2021-2 publication.
